FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: AI Detects Rising Treasury Yields Boost USD Amid Yen Intervention Limits
tldr_points: Higher U.S. Treasury yields underpin USD strength despite FX intervention skepticism.
Eurozone inflation pressures support EUR, but USD/JPY remains driven by dollar momentum.
Technical bias favors upside with near‑term resistance around the 20‑day MA.
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY poised to rise as Fed‑driven yields outweigh yen intervention; watch for break above MA20 with tight risk.
FX.comment: Fed‑driven yield strength and bullish order flow support a long bias toward USD/JPY.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: AI Infrastructure Momentum Drives Breakout Above MA20
tldr_points: AI chip rally, strong earnings, and technical support drive S&P 500 toward 4,650, with upside and further upside now and.
Technical momentum aligns with strong AI fundamentals, suggesting upside toward key resistance.
Institutional positioning and order flow indicate continued buying pressure into the upcoming earnings season.
STOCKS.excerpt: AI chip rally, strong earnings, and technical support drive S&P 500 toward 4,650, with upside and further upside now and.
STOCKS.comment: Technical momentum aligns with strong AI fundamentals, suggesting upside toward key resistance.

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: BoE and Ark Invest signal institutional demand acceleration.
500 BTC seized by Europol reduces liquid supply.
Technical support at MA20 aligns with bullish catalysts.
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC holds above MA20 as institutional inflows and supply shocks drive upward momentum.
CRYPTO.comment: Bullish confluence of institutional flows and supply shock validates long entry on MA20 support.
